designs.description: Clean lines, organic curves, and bold graphic elements from the 1950s-60s design era. Think Eames, Saul Bass, and Herb Lubalin. Geometric yet warm, structured yet playful.

Dynamic, animated typography where text moves, transforms, and responds to user interaction in real-time. Text becomes an active element of storytelling rather than passive content, using motion to guide attention, convey emotion, and create memorable moments.
